h2. Selected JVM Problems and Input Values
*System:* DEMO_CounterAgent
*Container:* application
*Selected problems:* none (context-only run)

|| Parameter || Value ||
| gc_pause_p95_ms | N/A |
| gc_pause_p99_ms | N/A |
| gc_time_ratio_percent | N/A |
| container_memory_usage_percent | N/A |
| heap_used_mib | N/A |
| heap_used_percent | 84 |
| old_gen_used_mib | N/A |
| old_gen_capacity_mib | N/A |
| old_gen_used_percent | 81 |
| new_gen_used_mib | N/A |
| new_gen_capacity_mib | N/A |
| new_gen_used_percent | N/A |


h2. JVM Tuning Recommendation
*System:* DEMO_CounterAgent
*Target container:* application
*Lifecycle status:* tuning_attempted

h3. Runtime Context
|| Parameter || Value ||
| JDK version | N/A |
| Spring Boot version | N/A |
| Heap used (MiB) | N/A |
| OldGen used (MiB) | N/A |
| OldGen capacity (MiB) | N/A |
| GC pause p95 (ms) | N/A |
| GC pause p99 (ms) | N/A |
| GC time ratio (%) | N/A |
| Container memory working set (MiB) | N/A |
| Container memory limit (MiB) | 8192 |

h3. Findings
* *[WARNING]* jvm.flag_missing_container_support: JVM flag -XX:+UseContainerSupport is not explicitly configured.
* *[WARNING]* jvm.flag_missing_exit_on_oom: JVM flag -XX:+ExitOnOutOfMemoryError is not configured.
* *[INFO]* jvm.gc_not_declared: No explicit GC policy flag found.
* *[WARNING]* oldgen.high_utilization_signal: OldGen utilization is high (81.0%).
** source: ui.metric_input

h3. Recommended Java Tool Options
h4. Recommendation 1: Container support flag is missing
*Rationale:* JVM options do not explicitly include container-awareness flag.
*Confidence:* low
*Evidence score:* 30/100
*Risk score:* 20/100
*Expected gain:* predictable memory ergonomics
*Verification window:* 30-60m after deploy
*Platform escalation required:* No
*Suggested options:*
** {code}-XX:+UseContainerSupport{code}
*Rollback plan:*
** Rollback to previous JVM option set if SLA worsens.
*Notes:*
** Ensure container support behavior is explicit for your JDK baseline.
** Config diff:
** - add -XX:+UseContainerSupport=enabled

h4. Recommendation 2: ExitOnOutOfMemoryError is missing
*Rationale:* Missing deterministic crash policy on OOM.
*Confidence:* low
*Evidence score:* 30/100
*Risk score:* 20/100
*Expected gain:* faster recovery on OOM
*Verification window:* 30-60m after deploy
*Platform escalation required:* No
*Suggested options:*
** {code}-XX:+ExitOnOutOfMemoryError{code}
*Rollback plan:*
** Rollback to previous JVM option set if SLA worsens.
*Notes:*
** Add ExitOnOutOfMemoryError to speed restart by orchestrator.
** Config diff:
** - add -XX:+ExitOnOutOfMemoryError=enabled

h4. Recommendation 3: GC strategy not explicitly declared
*Rationale:* JVM config does not pin collector strategy.
*Confidence:* low
*Evidence score:* 30/100
*Risk score:* 10/100
*Expected gain:* deterministic behavior across JDK updates
*Verification window:* 30-60m after deploy
*Platform escalation required:* No
*Suggested options:*
** {code}-XX:+UseG1GC{code}
*Rollback plan:*
** Rollback to previous JVM option set if SLA worsens.
*Notes:*
** Explicitly document/declare collector policy for consistency.
** Config diff:
** - add -XX:+UseG1GC=enabled


h3. Engineer Validation Runbook
# Apply recommended JVM options in test/stage environment first. Keep previous values for rollback.
# Run at least one representative load profile and compare with baseline metrics collected before the change.
# If no measurable improvement after the observation window, set status to tuning_not_effective and prepare escalation to dump analysis.

h3. Change Risks and Side Effects
* Any JVM option change can shift latency and throughput profile; always compare SLA/SLO against baseline.
* Rollback plan is mandatory: keep previous JVM flags and resource limits so the team can revert quickly.

h3. Escalation Rule
* If tuning recommendations do not improve GC/heap/memory-pressure metrics in the defined observation window, escalate to development team for heap dump and memory analysis.


h3. Problem-driven Context Validation
*Selected problems:* -
*Target container:* application

|| Problem || Input status || Missing required metrics ||

h3. Recommendation Strategy (Safe/Balanced/Aggressive)
h3. Targeted Outcome
* Findings in scope: 4; recommendations in scope: 3.

h3. Proposed Changes (Copy/Paste)
h4. jvm-config
{code:yaml}
application:
  javaToolOptions: >
    -XX:+UseContainerSupport
    -XX:+ExitOnOutOfMemoryError
    -XX:+UseG1GC
{code}

h4. Change summary
* add -XX:+UseContainerSupport=enabled
* add -XX:+ExitOnOutOfMemoryError=enabled
* add -XX:+UseG1GC=enabled
